case_title: CELEDONIO VILLANUEVA RUIZ VS. JULISA VALERIA GARCIA RAMIREZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-21-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO OCT-22-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF CELEDONIO VILLANUEVA RUIZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENTS FOR DETAILS.

REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF VILLANUEVA RUIZ, CELEDONIO

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF CELEDONIO VILLANUEVA RUIZ. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT JULISA VALERIA GARCIA RAMIREZ. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY VILLANUEVA RUIZ, CELEDONIO AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA RAMIREZ, JULISA VALERIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-21-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
